name: Landai Technology Group Corp., Ltd.
summary: Landai Technology Group Corp., Ltd. primarily engages in the research, design, development, manufacture, and sale of power transmission assemblies, transmission parts, and die-casting products for the automotive, textile machinery, and general machinery markets in China. It offers manual, automatic, and new energy transmission assemblies; automotive transmission gears, engine gears, engine blocks, and steering gear housings; balance boxes and shafts; synchronizers, transmission housings, mechanical die-cast parts, transmission cases/cylinders, tooth products, and other components; and textile machinery components. The company also develops, produces, and sells touch screens, touch display integrated modules, capacitive touch screens, and touch display modules and cover glasses. Its touch sensors are primarily used in information terminals, such as tablet and notebook computers, industrial control terminals, automotive electronics, and IoT smart devices, as well as touch input interfaces. The company also exports its products to the Middle East. The company was formerly known as Chongqing Landai Powertrain Corp., Ltd. and changed its name to Landai Technology Group Corp., Ltd. in October 2020. Landai Technology Group Corp., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is based in Chongqing, China.
